mapper.sql: id, reporter_id, target_type, target_id, category, reason, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = #{status}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{reportId}
UPDATE reports SET status = #{status}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW() WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND status = 'pending'
